verses.text: Offences must come, but woe to him by whom; better a millstone than to offend a little one. Solemn caution. To trip a believer is a grievous sin.
Offences must come, but woe to him by whom; better a millstone than to offend a little one. Solemn caution. To trip a believer is a grievous sin.
If thy brother repent, forgive him, though seven times a day. Boundless pardon. Forgiveness is to be ready and repeated.
If thy brother repent, forgive him, though seven times a day. Boundless pardon. Forgiveness is to be ready and repeated.
Increase our faith; faith as a mustard seed could uproot a tree. Small but mighty. A little true faith does great things by God's power.
Increase our faith; faith as a mustard seed could uproot a tree. Small but mighty. A little true faith does great things by God's power.
When ye have done all, say, 'We are unprofitable servants; we have done that which was our duty.' No boasting. Even our best is but our debt to God.
When ye have done all, say, 'We are unprofitable servants; we have done that which was our duty.' No boasting. Even our best is but our debt to God.
When ye have done all, say, 'We are unprofitable servants; we have done that which was our duty.' No boasting. Even our best is but our debt to God.
When ye have done all, say, 'We are unprofitable servants; we have done that which was our duty.' No boasting. Even our best is but our debt to God.
Ten lepers cry for mercy; go shew yourselves to the priests; as they go, they are cleansed. Healing in obedience. They are cured as they act on His word.
Ten lepers cry for mercy; go shew yourselves to the priests; as they go, they are cleansed. Healing in obedience. They are cured as they act on His word.
Ten lepers cry for mercy; go shew yourselves to the priests; as they go, they are cleansed. Healing in obedience. They are cured as they act on His word.
Ten lepers cry for mercy; go shew yourselves to the priests; as they go, they are cleansed. Healing in obedience. They are cured as they act on His word.
One, a Samaritan, returns and falls down giving thanks. Grateful stranger. The foreigner alone comes back to praise.
One, a Samaritan, returns and falls down giving thanks. Grateful stranger. The foreigner alone comes back to praise.
Were not ten cleansed? 'where are the nine?' thy faith hath made thee whole. Rare thanks. Few return to give God the glory.
Were not ten cleansed? 'where are the nine?' thy faith hath made thee whole. Rare thanks. Few return to give God the glory.
Were not ten cleansed? 'where are the nine?' thy faith hath made thee whole. Rare thanks. Few return to give God the glory.
The kingdom comes not 'with observation'; 'the kingdom of God is within you.' Inward reign. God's kingdom is first a rule in the heart.
The kingdom comes not 'with observation'; 'the kingdom of God is within you.' Inward reign. God's kingdom is first a rule in the heart.
The Son of man's day shall flash like lightning; but first He must suffer. Cross before glory. The Saviour must die before He reigns.
The Son of man's day shall flash like lightning; but first He must suffer. Cross before glory. The Saviour must die before He reigns.
The Son of man's day shall flash like lightning; but first He must suffer. Cross before glory. The Saviour must die before He reigns.
The Son of man's day shall flash like lightning; but first He must suffer. Cross before glory. The Saviour must die before He reigns.
As in the days of Noah and Lot, men ate and drank till judgment fell. Unawares. The end will find the careless world unprepared.
As in the days of Noah and Lot, men ate and drank till judgment fell. Unawares. The end will find the careless world unprepared.

As in the days of Noah and Lot, men ate and drank till judgment fell. Unawares. The end will find the careless world unprepared.
Return not for thy goods; 'Remember Lot's wife'; whoso seeks to save his life shall lose it. Look forward. Clinging to this world forfeits the next.
Return not for thy goods; 'Remember Lot's wife'; whoso seeks to save his life shall lose it. Look forward. Clinging to this world forfeits the next.
Return not for thy goods; 'Remember Lot's wife'; whoso seeks to save his life shall lose it. Look forward. Clinging to this world forfeits the next.
Two in a bed, one taken, one left; where the body is, the eagles gather. Sudden division. The coming day sifts the near companions apart.
